channel.title: Blog Cover on DebugInn AI Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Blog Cover on DebugInn AI Tools

item.title: Blog Cover Generator
item.description: Generate glowing landscape hero images for blog posts with a centered logo, oversized title treatment, and quick PNG export.

item.title: Blog 主题图生成器
item.description: 用来快速生成 blog 文章封面图。支持上传 Logo、设置标题与副标题，自动生成中心图标加大字发光背景的横向主题图。
